metadata.title: Tiny Swords asset index
metadata.description: Index of every PNG in the three Tiny Swords packs by Pixel Frog (Free Pack, Enemy Pack, Update 010). Built as the source catalogue for LoRA training datasets (FLUX.2-klein-4B, style token T1NYSW0RDS) and for any other agent that needs to locate or slice these assets.
metadata.root: . (paths are relative to this index.json; folder is copy-paste portable)
metadata.license_note: Assets are Pixel Frog's Tiny Swords packs. Verify pack license terms before redistributing assets or derived model weights outside personal/owned projects.

schema.uri: URL-encoded link relative to this index.json
schema.name: file name without extension
schema.alpha_bbox: [x0,y0,x1,y1] bounding box of non-transparent pixels, null if fully transparent
schema.x_frames/y_frames: animation frame runs detected along each axis, split on fully-transparent gap columns/rows (alpha <= 8)
schema.cell_hint: square cell size when frames were inferred from width being a multiple of height (strips without transparent gaps)
schema.error: present if the file could not be analyzed

usage_hints: To slice frames: split on fully-transparent columns/rows, or use cell_hint-sized square cells when present.
Terrain/UI tilesets tile edge-to-edge: est_frames is not meaningful for them, prefer category filtering.
For style-training datasets prefer Factions/Enemies/Deco/Resources sprites over UI and flat Terrain tiles.
